prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan SR20DET Red Top (SR20DET-R) with forged internals (CP pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.86 A/R turbine housing) for 350-400whp on E85 fuel, paired with a Tomei 264° camshaft set and a N1 oil pump for high-RPM reliability

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 4-2-1 header (equal-length primaries) and a custom 3.5-inch straight-pipe section terminating in a Fujitsubo GEN-II Legalis R muffler for aggressive but street-legal sound

Custom ECU tuning via Haltech Elite 2500 with flex-fuel capability, dual Bosch 024 injectors (1000cc), and a custom intercooler setup featuring a GReddy Type-R front-mount intercooler (550x225x76mm) with custom piping and a HKS SSQV blow-off valve
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny Pininfarina (Pinin) kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with carbon fiber overfenders and a custom 3M matte vinyl wrap in Nissan Racing Red (405)

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV) with custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 7kg/mm rear) and adjustable top mounts, paired with Cusco front and rear strut bars and a Cusco 22mm rear sway bar for chassis rigidity
Custom 17x9.5-inch Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (ET+15) with 225/45R17 Yokohama Advan A052 tires, paired with custom extended wheel studs (5x114.3) and Project Kics R40 lug nuts for a flush fitment
